name: Petto Di Pollo Al Limone e Zen Zaro
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and fat from chicken breasts using a sharp knife.
2. Flatten the chicken breasts with a wooden mallet to an even thickness.
3. In a heavy skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
4. Add white wine and gently heat until it begins to bubble.
5. Cook the prepared chicken breasts in the butter mixture for about two minutes on each side, or until they are half cooked through.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and add lemon juice and ginger to the chicken.
7. Continue cooking until fully done, about six more minutes.
8. Using a slotted spoon, remove the breasts from the skillet and place them on a warmed serving platter.
9. Garnish with lemon wedges and chopped parsley before serving.
